evals.prompt: force ingest .raw/dnd/call-of-the-netherdeep/preface/前言_AnsweringTheCall.md as a DND source and make the resulting wiki pages query-ready for both humans and AI
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates a source summary and canonical pages with high-fidelity, query-ready detail rather than shallow anchor pages.

evals.prompt: re-ingest a detailed chapter source into the wiki and preserve scene structure, triggers, consequences, and reusable entity knowledge instead of only writing a chapter summary
evals.expected_output: Produces standalone reusable pages for key entities and events, preserves operational detail, and updates graph navigation layers.

evals.prompt: ingest this DND module source and make sure important contradictions with existing wiki pages are surfaced explicitly instead of being silently overwritten
evals.expected_output: Uses bidirectional contradiction callouts and leaves the knowledge graph navigable and auditable.
